title: Regroup on Website Refresh Initiative
summary: Michael Donovan expressed frustration with the current WordPress website's issues and technical debt, revealing he independently developed a modern alternative. Joe Furnari insisted Michael follow Vinnie's directive to update only a few pages on the existing WordPress site to assess messaging, requesting links to the first 2-3 updated pages by Monday, maintaining the current site's look and feel.

decisions.description: Focus on updating 4-5 pages of new content on the existing WordPress site.
Michael Donovan will send links to the first 2-3 updated pages to Joe Furnari.
Updated pages should preferably maintain the current website's look and feel.

actionItems.task: Send links to the first 2-3 updated pages to Joe Furnari.
Review the updated page links and provide feedback.
Update global design elements (font, colors) and remove unused plugins on existing site.

tensions: Michael Donovan's frustration with the poorly built WordPress site and its technical debt.
Disagreement between Michael Donovan and Joe Furnari on prioritizing a new website solution versus updating the existing WordPress site.
Michael Donovan's difficulty and frustration with Vinnie's directive to update the 'sloppy' existing site.
Joe Furnari's concern that showing Vinnie the new website or technical complexities would cause frustration.
Michael Donovan's strong resistance to creating a PDF of the updated pages as requested by Joe Furnari.
referencesToPast: Vinnie's acknowledgment a couple days ago that a new site is needed long-term.
Vinnie's prior directive to update content on the existing WordPress site.
Discussion last Tuesday about the look and feel of the website.
Vinnie sent 10 pages and a PDF last week for content.
Previous SEO firm 'broke some of the algorithms' and changed site function/appearance.

contributions.description: Detailed current WordPress site issues like weird formatting, plugins, and navigation inconsistency.
Proposed setting global design elements like font (Montserrat) and theme colors.
Suggested improving the site by removing unused plugins.
Revealed independent development of a new website solution with all current content and dark/light theme.
Outlined a modern mega menu structure for the new site, detailing sections and features.
Described the planned standard hamburger menu experience for mobile devices on the new site.
Proposed pushing the new solution to staging and sharing a link for review.
Insisted Michael Donovan must follow Vinnie's directive to update content on the existing WordPress site.
Requested links to 2-3 updated pages, preferably with current site's look and feel, for Vinnie's review.
